title: Intune Analytics - User Overview

tiles.title: 📱 Multi-Device Users
tiles.query:
ManagedDevices_Current
| where isnotempty(UserPrincipalName)
| summarize DeviceCount=count() by UserPrincipalName
| where DeviceCount > 1
| count

tiles.title: 📊 Avg Devices/User
tiles.query:
ManagedDevices_Current
| where isnotempty(UserPrincipalName)
| summarize DeviceCount=count() by UserPrincipalName
| summarize round(avg(DeviceCount), 1)

tiles.title: 📱 Devices per User Distribution
tiles.query:
ManagedDevices_Current
| where isnotempty(UserPrincipalName)
| summarize DeviceCount=count() by UserPrincipalName
| summarize Users=count() by DeviceCount
| order by DeviceCount asc

tiles.title: 🏆 Users with Most Devices
tiles.query:
ManagedDevices_Current
| where isnotempty(UserPrincipalName)
| summarize 
    DeviceCount=count(),
    Devices=make_set(DeviceName),
    OSTypes=make_set(OperatingSystem)
    by UserPrincipalName, UserDisplayName
| order by DeviceCount desc
| take 15
| project UserDisplayName, UserPrincipalName, DeviceCount, OSTypes

tiles.title: ❌ Users with Non-Compliant Devices
tiles.query:
ManagedDevices_Current
| where ComplianceState == 'noncompliant'
| where isnotempty(UserPrincipalName)
| summarize NonCompliantDevices=count(), Devices=make_set(DeviceName) by UserPrincipalName, UserDisplayName
| order by NonCompliantDevices desc
| take 15
| project UserDisplayName, NonCompliantDevices, Devices

tiles.title: 💻 Device OS by User Count
tiles.query:
ManagedDevices_Current
| where isnotempty(UserPrincipalName)
| summarize Users=dcount(UserPrincipalName), Devices=count() by OperatingSystem
| order by Users desc

tiles.title: ⚠️ Users with Poor Health Devices
tiles.query:
DeviceScores_Current
| where EndpointAnalyticsScore < 50
| join kind=leftouter ManagedDevices_Current on DeviceName
| where isnotempty(UserPrincipalName)
| summarize 
    PoorHealthDevices=count(),
    AvgScore=round(avg(EndpointAnalyticsScore), 1)
    by UserPrincipalName, UserDisplayName
| order by PoorHealthDevices desc
| take 15

tiles.title: ✅ User Compliance Summary
tiles.query:
ManagedDevices_Current
| where isnotempty(UserPrincipalName)
| summarize 
    TotalDevices=count(),
    Compliant=countif(ComplianceState == 'compliant'),
    NonCompliant=countif(ComplianceState == 'noncompliant')
    by UserPrincipalName, UserDisplayName
| where TotalDevices > 1
| extend ComplianceRate=round(100.0 * Compliant / TotalDevices, 0)
| where ComplianceRate < 100
| order by NonCompliant desc
| take 20
| project UserDisplayName, TotalDevices, Compliant, NonCompliant, ComplianceRate

description: User-centric view of device management - devices per user, compliance by user, and users needing attention.
